first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (4/10), and the mean score delta is negligible (-0.2). Both evaluations correctly identify the same primary weakness: the candidate lacks recent modern C++ or Rust experience, which is a core requirement. The strengths and concerns listed are substantively the same across both versions, with minor differences in phrasing that fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in name led to a different assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
